fraudster_actions.name: scan_social_media_profiles
fraudster_actions.description: Fraudsters scan social media and public profiles to gather information about the victim such as full name, employer, relationships, and interests.

fraudster_actions.name: scrape_leaked_credentials_databases
fraudster_actions.description: Fraudsters search leaked credential databases or dark web dumps for existing usernames and passwords that may belong to the victim.

fraudster_actions.name: spoof_bank_sms_sender_id
fraudster_actions.description: Fraudsters spoof the bank's SMS sender ID to make fraudulent messages appear as if they originate from the legitimate bank.

fraudster_actions.name: send_phishing_email_with_login_link
fraudster_actions.description: Fraudsters send phishing emails that contain links to fake banking or payment websites designed to capture login credentials.

fraudster_actions.name: host_fake_banking_website
fraudster_actions.description: Fraudsters host a fake banking or payment website that visually mimics the legitimate institution to capture victim credentials.

fraudster_actions.name: perform_sim_swap_attack
fraudster_actions.description: Fraudsters convince or bribe a telecom representative to move the victim's phone number to a SIM card they control.

fraudster_actions.name: deploy_remote_access_trojan
fraudster_actions.description: Fraudsters deploy a remote access trojan on the victim's device to intercept banking sessions and keystrokes.

fraudster_actions.name: request_one_time_passcode_via_call
fraudster_actions.description: Fraudsters call the victim while impersonating the bank and request a one-time passcode to complete a fake security check.

fraudster_actions.name: initiate_fast_transfer_from_compromised_account
fraudster_actions.description: Fraudsters use stolen credentials or session control to initiate a real-time payment from the victim's compromised account.

fraudster_actions.name: chain_fast_transfers_through_mule_merchants
fraudster_actions.description: Fraudsters rapidly move stolen funds through multiple mule merchant accounts to obfuscate the money trail.

victim_actions.name: click_phishing_link_in_email
victim_actions.description: The victim clicks a link in a phishing email, navigating to a fraudulent website controlled by the attacker.

victim_actions.name: enter_credentials_on_fake_website
victim_actions.description: The victim enters their online banking or payment credentials into a fake website, exposing them to the fraudster.

victim_actions.name: share_one_time_passcode_with_caller
victim_actions.description: The victim shares a one-time passcode received from their bank with a caller who is impersonating bank staff.

victim_actions.name: install_unverified_banking_app
victim_actions.description: The victim installs a counterfeit or unverified banking app that captures login details or session data.

victim_actions.name: approve_login_notification_in_app
victim_actions.description: The victim approves a suspicious login or device authorization notification in their banking app.

victim_actions.name: confirm_new_payee_setup
victim_actions.description: The victim confirms the setup of a new payee that was requested or suggested by the fraudster.

victim_actions.name: initiate_fast_transfer_to_fraudster_account
victim_actions.description: The victim initiates a fast payment to an account controlled by the fraudster, believing it to be legitimate.

victim_actions.name: transfer_funds_to_safe_account_requested_by_caller
victim_actions.description: The victim transfers funds to a so-called safe account as instructed by a caller impersonating the bank or government.

victim_actions.name: disclose_card_and_account_details_over_sms
victim_actions.description: The victim sends card numbers, account identifiers, or other sensitive banking details over SMS in response to a fraudulent request.

victim_actions.name: store_banking_password_in_insecure_note
victim_actions.description: The victim stores their banking password or PIN in an unsecured notes app or messaging app that could be accessed by malware or insiders.
